title: All Bookshelves in Lecterns
description: A tiny data pack that lets you craft lecterns with Chiseled Bookshelves as well.
body:
This is a data pack that just lets you craft Lecterns with a Chiseled Bookshelf as well as a Bookshelf - simple as!

![The Lectern crafting recipe preview in the Recipe Book. Cycles through all wood types and both types of Bookshelf.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Uo7t8Ty5/images/efabd5f1e55f9af2acdb68e018847b96d1ad8759.gif)

It synergises well with [Just Bookcases](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/just-bookcases) and [Chiseled Bookshelves Add Enchantment Power]([https://modrinth.com/datapack/purpurpacks-chiseled-bookshelves-add-enchantment-power/gallery](https://modrinth.com/datapack/purpurpacks-chiseled-bookshelves-add-enchantment-power/gallery)) :)
